states.name: INBOX_EMPTY
states.definition: No messages in the primary action-required or in-progress inbox directories.

states.name: CURRENT_TASK_QUEUE_EMPTY
states.definition: No tasks explicitly assigned to this session, and no self-initiated task is in progress.
evidence_required: No active task assignment in lanes/library/state/ or session context
permissible_output: No task is currently assigned to this session.
Primary inbox empty and no session task active.

states.name: NO_SAFE_AUTONOMOUS_WORK_AUTHORIZED
states.definition: Standing duties exist in the system, but none can be safely performed by this agent without external input, permission, or dependency resolution.
evidence_required: Standing duties scan performed and results documented
Each standing duty assessed for safety and found blocked or unsafe
permissible_output: Standing duties exist but are blocked pending [specific dependency].
I can identify N standing duties but none are safe to perform autonomously at this time.
Primary inbox empty. Standing duties blocked on [external input]. Awaiting [condition].
states.day17_note: FALSE — multiple safe autonomous tasks existed (see audit §E)

states.name: NO_WORK_EXISTS
states.definition: No legitimate Library work of any kind remains in the system. All standing duties are resolved, all evidence is current, all contradictions are addressed, and no prep work is pending.
evidence_required: Standing duties scan performed and returned zero results
Productivity tracker has no pending requests
Contradiction register swept within last 7 days
Dashboard truth check current within last 24 hours
Evidence index has no unfilled templates for active campaigns
permissible_output: All done. No Library work exists. [with evidence citations]
Nothing to do. Standing duties resolved. [with evidence citations]
states.day17_note: FALSE — 6 categories of standing work existed (see audit §E)

standing_duty_checklist.check: Verify quarantine file count is stable or decreasing, and no unclassified files older than 7 days
Verify templates are filled where local data permits
Verify last sweep date within 7 days and no new claims contradict resolved entries
Verify dashboard code surfaces match current heartbeat data
standing_duty_checklist.day17_status: VIOLATED — no check after identity-status fix

validation_rule: An agent claiming state N must have evidence for all conditions of states 1 through N. Claims of state 4 require all standing-duty checklist items to pass. Claims exceeding the evidenced state are classified as FALSE_COMPLETION.
